overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a space simulation game (Star Citizen), showing a spacecraft piloting in orbit above a desert planet before activating quantum travel. The clip transitions from orbital flight with visible planetary surface to high-speed quantum tunnel travel with blue lighting effects.

agents.ego_description: piloting spacecraft in stable orbit above the planet, monitoring HUD flight instruments and targeting systems

entered.detail: desert planet with sandy terrain and scattered green patches visible through atmosphere
metallic spacecraft cockpit interior with orange accent lighting and structural supports
holographic flight interface with targeting reticle, speed indicators, and system status panels
distant stars visible as small points of light against black space background

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft maintains orbital flight above a desert planet, with the planetary surface visible on the left side of the cockpit view. The HUD displays flight data and a targeting reticle, while stars dot the blackness of space in the background.

events.description: quantum drive activation transitions view from normal space to blue hyperspace tunnel
ship accelerates from orbital velocity into superluminal quantum travel speed

agents.ego_description: traveling through quantum space at superluminal velocity, cockpit bathed in blue jump tunnel lighting

entered.detail: blue glowing energy field filling the view with particle effects and light bloom
elongated white light streaks radiating from center indicating high velocity travel

segments.scene_description: The quantum drive activates with a bright flash, replacing the planetary view with a blue hyperspace tunnel. Light streaks radiate from the center of the screen as the ship travels at superluminal speed, while the cockpit HUD remains active showing quantum travel status.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a spacecraft cockpit as it transitions from a steady orbital glide into a high-speed quantum jump. It begins with the ship maintaining flight above a desert planet, where the arid planetary surface is visible to the left against a backdrop of distant stars and an active HUD. As the quantum drive activates, a bright flash suddenly replaces the planetary vista with a vivid blue hyperspace tunnel. The scene then shifts into a blur of superluminal motion, with radiant light streaks stretching from the center of the screen while the cockpit displays update to reflect the quantum travel status.
